---
title: "Telling Stories with Data"
date: today
---

# What is Good Data Visualization?

# What Makes a Bad Visualization?

The data visuals we may deem as "bad" typically have at least one of three things in common:

1.  Aesthetic Problems
2.  Substantive Problems: The visual has a problem due to the data presented
3.  Perceptual: The visual is confusing or misleading
